message:
refactor(core,types): fix retained autocommit delete-verification test and add value pool allocation telemetry

- Fix autocommit oracle test to use read_stmt (SELECT *) instead of
  removed count_stmt for delete verification, comparing result set
  length against oracle COUNT instead of extracting a count value
  from a non-count query — corrects a logic error from the previous
  prepared-statement refactor
- Add ValuePoolStats test-only instrumentation to fsqlite-types value
  pool: tracks slab_alloc_count, slab_return_count,
  global_alloc_fallback_count, and slab_high_water_mark via
  thread-local counters gated behind #[cfg(test)]
- Instrument pool_acquire() and pool_return() with test-only recording
  calls for allocation hit/miss and pool size tracking
- Add reset_value_pool_test_stats() and value_pool_test_stats_snapshot()
  helpers for test assertions on pool behavior
- Update legacy SQLite submodule pointer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
